channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bucs' 2024 first-round pick reflects on rookie year
item.description: Rookie center Graham Barton has taken the NFL by storm and reflected on his first year in the league.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Canadiens' Emil Heineman is out 3-4 weeks after getting hit by a car while walking in Salt Lake City
item.description: Montreal Canadiens player Emil Heineman is expected to miss three to four weeks after being hit by a car while walking in downtown Salt Lake City a day before playing at the Utah Hockey Club.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Former Cowboys Deion Sanders and Jason Witten are among names floated as club's next coach
item.description: Deion Sanders and Jason Witten are two of Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones’ former — and favorite — players, and both have been floated as potential replacements for coach Mike McCarthy.
item.dc:creator: Schuyler Dixon, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Patrick Mahomes watched the playoffs while awaiting his child's birth. Now, he's ready to play
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Patrick Mahomes had his mind on the playoffs even as he was awaiting the arrival of his third child. The Chiefs quarterback said Tuesday that his wife, Brittany, let him watch some of the wild-card games Sunday while they were waiting for her to give birth.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sam Darnold's Vikings future in question after poor playoff game as head coach makes telling comment
item.description: Minnesota Vikings quarterback Sam Darnold's future with the team was in question after Monday night's loss to the Los Angeles Rams in the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jemele Hill quietly deletes Caitlin Clark post following stalker arrest
item.description: Former ESPN broadcaster Jemele Hill was caught deleting a critical tweet about Caitlin Clark dealing with social media adversity after an alleged stalker was arrested.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL great Troy Aikman slams Cowboys over Mike McCarthy departure
item.description: Pro Football Hall of Famer Troy Aikman did not mince words when he talked about the Dallas Cowboys and Mike McCarthy stepping down as head coach.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Daniil Medvedev destroys a TV camera attached to the net during his 5-set Australian Open win
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Daniil Medvedev used his racket to smash a tiny camera attached to the net at the Australian Open while he was trailing someone ranked 418th before eventually avoiding a monumental upset and winning 6-2, 4-6, 3-6, 6-1, 6-2 in the first round at Rod Laver Arena on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Mike McCarthy not returning as coach of the Dallas Cowboys, AP source says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Mike McCarthy is not returning as head coach of the Dallas Cowboys, who are going on three decades since their last Super Bowl title, a person with knowledge of the decision told The Associated Press on Monday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Auburn rises to No. 1 in AP Top 25 after Tennessee loses, Georgia is ranked for 1st time since 2011
item.description: Auburn has climbed to No. 1 in The Associated Press men's basketball poll for its second stint at the top in program history, while fellow Southeastern Conference program Georgia is in the rankings for the first time in 14 years.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah State beats Boise State on 4-point play, 81-79
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The #25 Utah State men’s basketball remained perfect in league play in dramatic fashion, defeating Boise State 81-79 in the Dee Glen Smith Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ezra Ausar scores 21 as Utah earns first Big 12 victory
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Ezra Ausar scored a season-high 21 points in just 17 minutes of action. as the Utah basketball team won its first Big 12 Conference game Saturday, beating Oklahoma State, 83-62.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Devin Booker scores 34 in Suns' 114-106 win over Jazz
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) - Devin Booker scored 34 points and the Phoenix Suns never trailed in a 114-106 victory over the Utah Jazz on Saturday. Booker had 22 points in the first half on 7-of-8 shooting, including 4 of 5 from 3-point range. He finished 12 for 20 overall and 6 for 12 from behind the arc.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago faces Sacramento, aims for 5th straight home win
item.description: Sacramento Kings (19-19, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (18-20, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 3:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Chicago hosts Sacramento aiming to extend its four-game home winning streak. The Bulls have gone 8-11 at home.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Hayton scores dramatic goal in 2-1 win over San Jose
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Barrett Hayton scored with 1:32 remaining in regulation to give the Utah Hockey Club a 2-1 win against the San Jose Sharks at Delta Center on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former finalist Josiah Cox relishing opportunity to return with SDSU football
item.description: Cox had 35 tackles and two interceptions for the Aggies in his year in Las Cruces, including an impressive performance against ranked Texas A&M. Those skills were apparent to SDSU head coach Sean Lewis and a retooled defensive coaching staff.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Aggies avoid upset at San Jose State, 85-78
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - In their first game of the season as a ranked team, the Utah State basketball team avoided a major upset at San Jose State Tuesday night. Mason Falslev had 17 points and seven rebounds, Tucker Anderson added 15 points and No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
